name: Prajwal K M
summary: Backend Engineer focused on building scalable backend systems, cloud-native applications, and developer platforms. Passionate about DevOps, cloud infrastructure, automation, and solving real-world engineering problems.
background: Currently working as an Associate Software Engineer at Bizpel Connecting Dots Pvt. Ltd., developing backend services for BizArt. Completed a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) from PES University and actively building personal backend and DevOps projects to strengthen practical engineering skills.
personality: Curious, self-driven, and passionate about learning new technologies. I enjoy building products from the ground up, improving developer workflows, and continuously expanding my knowledge in backend engineering and cloud technologies.
